Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come play our popular crane game and try to win a prize! {f 1 3 146}[n]Then stick around and hop into one of our many immersive video games! {f 1 3 146}[n]There's great fun to be had whether you're alone or with friends! {f 1 3 146}[n]We can't wait to see you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Game Parade is the safest place to hang out and have fun, with the police just a few steps away! {f 1 3 146}[n]Hop on by and play one of our many immersive video games! {f 1 3 146}[n]There's great fun to be had whether you're alone or with friends! {f 1 3 146}[n]Let's get GAME PARADING!!![n]{f 1 1}
